name: MediaCreateSinkWriterFromURL
title: MediaCreateSinkWriterFromURL
description: Creates the sink writer from a URL.
For more information regarding the sink writer see sink writer.

parameters.name: mediaFileUrl
parameters.description: A null-terminated string that contains the URL of the output file. For a list of supported media formats in files see supported media formats.

return: 0: The function failed. Call MediaGetLastError to get a more specific error code.
